basics.label: Senior Software Engineer & Software Architect
basics.summary: Software Engineer with expertise in designing and optimizing scalable backend architectures. Specialized in microservices, RESTful APIs, and distributed systems using Python (FastAPI) and Java (Spring Boot). Experienced in SQL/NoSQL databases, cloud-native deployments (Docker, Kubernetes, AWS), and design patterns like DDD and EDA. Passionate about performance optimization, CI/CD, automated testing, and security. Skilled in leading system modeling and implementation while mentoring teams and fostering innovation, quality, and continuous improvement.

abbott-esl.summary: Backend developer specialized in Enterprise Service Layer (ESL) development, building and integrating enterprise-grade services using Java and Spring ecosystem.
highlights: Developed enterprise services for Abbott's Enterprise Service Layer architecture
Implemented robust backend solutions using Java and Spring Framework
Built and maintained service integrations across Abbott's ecosystem
Ensured high-quality, scalable, and maintainable code following enterprise standards
Collaborated with cross-functional teams to deliver critical business services

sifone-architect.summary: Specialist in the design and implementation of microservices-based architectures, using Python and FastAPI to develop scalable, secure, and high-performance backend applications.
highlights: Designed and implemented microservices-based architectures using Python and FastAPI
Led requirements analysis, RESTful API modeling, and integration with SQL and NoSQL databases
Deployed services in cloud-native infrastructures using Docker and Kubernetes
Applied Domain-Driven Design (DDD), Event-Driven Architecture (EDA), and communication patterns (gRPC, Kafka, RabbitMQ)
Drove adoption of best development practices, test automation, and CI/CD strategies
Optimized performance and ensured solutions align with business needs

fullstacklabs-senior.summary: Software engineer with extensive experience in backend development, specializing in the architecture, design, and implementation of scalable and high-performance solutions using Java and Spring Boot.
highlights: Led requirements analysis, system modeling, and backend service optimization
Worked with high level of independence and efficiency
Collaborated closely with multidisciplinary teams
Drove technological strategies, continuous improvements, and developer mentorship
Ensured quality, innovation, and best development practices

fullstacklabs-mid.summary: Software development professional with a focus on Backend Development, specializing in the implementation and optimization of scalable services and architectures using Java and Spring Boot.
highlights: Analyzed requirements and designed efficient solutions that meet business needs
Worked closely with clients and multidisciplinary teams
Developed robust, maintainable systems aligned with industry best practices
Contributed to continuous application improvement and performance optimization
Ensured software quality through automated testing and best development practices

todo1-fullstack.summary: Design, develop, and maintain Full Stack applications, with a focus on hybrid mobile applications for Android and iOS, using modern technologies to ensure high performance and an optimized user experience.
highlights: Developed and enhanced application core based on Java and Spring Framework
Ensured efficient integration between backend and frontend
Participated in entire development lifecycle: planning, design, implementation, testing, and deployment
Ensured scalability and security of the system

todo1-mobile.summary: Design, develop, and maintain hybrid applications for Android and iOS devices using Apache Cordova, ensuring high performance, compatibility, and an optimized user experience.
highlights: Implemented new features, fixed bugs, and optimized applications
Coordinated deployment and publishing on Google Play Store and Apple App Store
Ensured proper versioning of the code and integration with REST APIs
Collaborated with design and backend teams to deliver efficient and scalable solutions

stt-fullstack.summary: Design, develop, and implement web applications and efficient systems for credit information bureaus, ensuring high performance, scalability, and security.
highlights: Participated in entire software development lifecycle
Utilized technologies such as AngularJS, Angular, Java Spring, and PHP
Built robust solutions optimizing user experience
Ensured data integrity and system security

znetworks.summary: Design, develop, and optimize applications and websites, ensuring an intuitive and efficient user experience.
highlights: Implemented custom solutions from web interface development to database integration
Specialized in implementation and customization of CMS platforms (WordPress, Drupal, Magento)
Ensured performance, security, and scalability
Collaborated with design, marketing, and development teams

highlights: Implemented solutions based on SugarCRM
Ensured scalability, security and efficiency in processes

Collaborated with multidisciplinary teams to meet project objectives

flix.summary: Design, develop, and optimize applications and websites, ensuring their functionality, performance, and user experience.
highlights: Implemented innovative solutions using front-end and back-end technologies
Integrated databases, APIs, and external systems according to business needs

ecci-bachelor.summary: Systems Engineering professional with experience in designing, developing, and implementing technological solutions. Specialized in software architecture, system administration, cybersecurity, and database management.

ecci-tecnologo.summary: Computer Systems Development technologist with solid foundations in programming, database design, and software development. Focused on building practical solutions and applying modern development methodologies.

scrum-sfpc.description: Professional certification in Scrum fundamentals and agile methodologies
